title: QDS Kids Mould and Paint Transport Vehicles Make Your Own Truck Figurines Painting Set
features: Kids Mould And Paint Transport Vehicle Craft Set.
Little ones will love creating their very own transport vehicle figurines and then painting them however they like.
The set includes plaster of paris, 4 paints, 1 paint brush & 4 transport moulds.
The vehicles you can create are: Dump Truck, Cement Mixer, Digger & Excavator
The set comes with simple instructions making this set fun and easy.
